title: Add detail panel close command
description:
Add CLI command to close the detail panel.

Command: kbs console close-detail

Behavior:
- Closes detail panel (clears selectedTask)
- Navigates to current viewMode root URL
- Returns to board view
- Idempotent (safe when detail already closed)

Implementation:
- Add DetailPanelClosed UIControl event
- Frontend handler calls same logic as detail panel close button
- Should match onClose handler behavior (lines 1076-1086 in App.tsx)
creator: ryan.porter
